# Azure Defaults Skill (Minimal)

**Naming Conventions** — CAF-compliant patterns for all resource types (rg-, vnet-, st, kv-, log-, afw-, etc.).

**Required Tags** — Environment, Owner, CostCenter, Project, ManagedBy on all resource groups.

**Default Region** — `southcentralus`, configurable via `AZURE_DEPLOYMENT_REGION`.

**AVM Module Registry** — AVM-first policy for both Bicep and Terraform.

**WAF Pillar Alignment** — Every resource assessed against all 5 WAF pillars.

Read `SKILL.md` or `SKILL.digest.md` for full content.
